labels: The one 'Disciplinarian.' (hooks)
"Look at me when I talk to you." (hooks)
"Afraid to look, but fascinated by the gaze." (hooks)
"Attempts to oppress our right to gaze." (hooks)
"The only visible [] female spectator." (hooks)
"A labour of love." (Federici)
"Exploited as you might be, you are not that work."
"Imposed" upon. (Federici)
"Transformed into a natural attribute of... female." (Federici)
"The unwaged condition of housework... a powerful weapon." (Federici)
"How natural is it that... it takes... socialization?" (Federici)
"A lot of us recognize... we marry for security." (Federici)
How secure is performance? How secure is femininity?
"Capital has been... successful in hiding our work." (Federici)
"Impossible to enjoy freedom... if trained." (Federici)
"Sacrifice yourself and even get pleasure from it." (Federici)
"Work almost for free; servants of the working class." (Federici)
"Not serve one man... we are in a servant relation." (Federici)
"Absurd to compare the struggle of women... to wages." (Federici)
"Attacks capital... forces it to restructure social relations." (Federici)
"To say wages for housework... exposes capital." (Federici)
"We did not have any other choices." (Federici)
"Does not mean... if we are paid, we will continue." (Federici)
"Capital has made and makes money... off our cooking." (Federici)
"As females... do not guarantee anything any longer." (Federici)
"Cannot love except at the price of... endless work." (Federici)
"Rediscover our sexuality... we have never known." (Federici)
"Heroic spouse." (Federici)
"Housemaids, prostitutes, nurses, shrinks." (Federici)
"From a radical perspective... we can ask for everything." (Federici)
"Attack our female role at its roots." (Federici)
"Day care... equal pay... free laundromats." (Federici)
"To give and receive affection... turned against us." (Federici)
"Getting a second job does not change that role." (Federici)
"Secretarial work, or is it a personal favour?" (Federici)
"Accept our services... presume housework is easy." (Federici)
"The opportunity to express ourselves at work." (Federici)
"Hated work which wastes our lives" is undermined. (Federici)
"Wages for housework will be more educational." (Federici)
"Overalls did not give us more power than the apron." (Federici)
"Afraid of identifying as a housewife; we are all..." (Federici)
"We are all housewives... prostitutes..." (Federici)
"We accept the logic of the master... of division." (Federici)
"Working outside the house... have we escaped it?" (Federici)
"Ageing... losing even the minimal amount of power." (Federici)
"And what about children?" (Federici)
"Who will "take care of us"?
(Federici)
"Enjoy your freedom... buy whatever you want now." (Federici, on society)
